items.q: What is the capital of Germany?
items.explanation: Berlin is the capital of Germany.

items.q: Name the capital city of South Korea.
items.explanation: The capital of South Korea is Seoul.

items.q: Name the capital city of Belgium.
items.explanation: The capital of Belgium is Brussels.

items.q: Name the capital city of Japan.
items.explanation: The capital of Japan is Tokyo.

items.q: How many continents are there on Earth?
items.explanation: The common model has seven continents.

items.q: Bangkok is the capital of Ireland.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.

items.q: Name the capital city of Spain.
items.explanation: The capital of Spain is Madrid.

items.q: Name the capital city of Italy.
items.explanation: The capital of Italy is Rome.

items.q: Name the capital city of France.
items.explanation: The capital of France is Paris.

items.q: Buenos Aires is the capital of Argentina.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.
